description: A bright two-bedroom apartment on the first floor of a well-maintained purpose-built block in Camberwell, SE5. The property comprises an entrance hallway, a spacious open-plan living and kitchen area, two bedrooms, and a bathroom. The development benefits from communal gardens and a secure entry system. Conveniently located for Loughborough Junction and Denmark Hill stations.
additional_notes: Seller is relocating abroad and motivated to sell promptly.
